name: NIST AI RMF to SicarioSpec Evidence Map

framework.name: NIST Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework

scope_note: Function-level starter mapping only. The AI RMF is voluntary and outcome-oriented across the Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage functions. Use the official NIST AI 100-1 publication and the AI RMF Playbook for authoritative category, subcategory, and action language. SicarioSpec evidence supports AI governance work; it is not an AI RMF conformance claim.

function_mappings.intent: Cultivate a culture of AI risk management: policies, accountability, roles, and human oversight across the AI lifecycle.
Establish context and identify risks: intended use, data, dependencies, trust boundaries, and impacts of the AI system.
Analyze, assess, and track AI risks using evals, red-team tests, and metrics, including for prompt injection and tool boundaries.
Prioritize and act on risks: response, recovery, kill switches, human approval gates, and ongoing monitoring.
